summary: Iteration 12 - Testing 6 new features: Streak System, Weekly Digest, Shareable Progress Cards, Neurotype-specific UI, University Intelligence, and Guided Tours. All 28 backend tests passed (100%). All frontend tests passed. All 6 new features working correctly.

issues: Tour tooltip may position outside viewport on step 2 - minor UX issue, tour still completes

passed_tests: POST /api/auth/login with valid credentials (test@simplifii.com / test123)
GET /api/streak returns 200 with auth
GET /api/streak has current_streak, longest_streak, checked_in_today, streak_dates
GET /api/streak streak_dates has exactly 14 items (14-day heatmap)
GET /api/streak streak_dates items have date and active fields
GET /api/streak requires authentication (401 without)
GET /api/digest/weekly returns 200 with auth
GET /api/digest/weekly has period, new_briefs, briefs_progress, mood_summary, motivational_message
GET /api/digest/weekly mood_summary has great, okay, struggling, overwhelmed counts
GET /api/digest/weekly briefs_progress items have title, brief_id, progress_pct, tasks_done, tasks_total
GET /api/digest/weekly requires authentication (401 without)
GET /api/share/card/{brief_id} returns 200 with valid brief
GET /api/share/card/{brief_id} has title, progress_pct, badges, share_text
GET /api/share/card/{brief_id} badges is array with name, icon, colour
GET /api/share/card/invalid_id returns 404
GET /api/share/card/{brief_id} requires authentication (401 without)
GET /api/user/neurotype-ui returns 200 with auth
GET /api/user/neurotype-ui has neurotype and ui_config
GET /api/user/neurotype-ui ui_config has label, spacing, tips
GET /api/user/neurotype-ui requires authentication (401 without)
GET /api/university/intel returns 200 with auth
GET /api/university/intel has university, grading, tips, referencing
GET /api/university/intel tips is array of strings
GET /api/university/intel requires authentication (401 without)
GET /api/activity/feed works without auth (public endpoint)
GET /api/notifications works with auth
GET /api/notifications requires authentication (401 without)
GET /api/briefs/history works with auth

Frontend: Streak widget visible with current streak count
Frontend: Streak heatmap shows 14 day indicators
Frontend: University Intel widget shows 'University of Sydney'
Frontend: All 9 tool cards visible on dashboard
Frontend: Accessibility toolbar visible with 5 buttons
Frontend: Weekly Digest page loads with 'Your Week in Review' title
Frontend: Weekly Digest shows motivational banner
Frontend: Weekly Digest shows stats (Streak, Tasks, Check-ins, New Briefs)
Frontend: Weekly Digest shows briefs progress section
Frontend: Results page loads with assessment title
Frontend: Share button visible on Results page
Frontend: Share card modal opens when Share button clicked
Frontend: Share card visual component shows progress ring
Frontend: Share button in modal visible
Frontend: Essay Scorer page has guided tour prompt
Frontend: Humaniser page has guided tour prompt
Frontend: Assessment Scaffolder page has guided tour prompt
Frontend: Course Planner page has guided tour prompt
Frontend: Hidden Curriculum Decoder page has guided tour prompt
Frontend: Executive Function Planner page has guided tour prompt
Frontend: Guided tour steps navigate correctly
critical_code_review_comments: All 6 new backend endpoints properly implemented in modular route files
Streak endpoint correctly calculates current/longest streak from checkins collection
Weekly digest aggregates data from briefs and checkins with proper date filtering
Share card endpoint generates badges based on progress milestones
Neurotype UI endpoint returns ADHD-optimised config for test user
University intel returns Sydney-specific grading info (HD 85-100, D 75-84, etc.)
Guided tours use localStorage keys to track completion/skip status
GuidedTour component properly highlights target elements with box-shadow
Minor React warning: 'Cannot update component while rendering' in Landing.js - cosmetic, not functional
seed_data_creation: None - used existing test user with university='usyd', neurotype='adhd', 2 briefs, and checkins

mocked_apis.Stripe: Credit check BYPASSED for owner testing

context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 12 complete. 6 new features tested: (1) Streak System - GET /api/streak returns current_streak, longest_streak, checked_in_today, streak_dates (14 items for heatmap). (2) Weekly Digest - GET /api/digest/weekly returns period, new_briefs, briefs_progress, mood_summary, motivational_message. (3) Shareable Progress Cards - GET /api/share/card/{brief_id} returns title, progress_pct, badges, share_text. (4) Neurotype UI - GET /api/user/neurotype-ui returns neurotype and ui_config with ADHD/dyslexic/autistic/anxious presets. (5) University Intelligence - GET /api/university/intel returns grading, tips, referencing for user's university. (6) Guided Tours - All 6 tool pages (Essay Scorer, Humaniser, Scaffolder, Course Planner, Hidden Curriculum, Executive Planner) have GuidedTour component with localStorage keys. Dashboard shows StreakWidget and UniIntel widgets in sidebar. Results page has Share button that opens ShareCard modal. Weekly Digest page at /weekly-digest shows stats and progress bars. Cookie-based auth working.
